# agent-action-policy

> Declarative action policies for AI agents — approve, deny, or escalate any tool call before execution.

- `pip install agent-action-policy` (optional: `[yaml]` for YAML loading)
- Python >=3.9 | zero required deps
- Pattern matching: exact, glob, regex for tools/args/paths
- Templates: `safe_coding`, `safe_browsing`, `safe_database`, `strict`
- Exports: `PolicyEngine`, `PolicyRule`, `Action`, `Decision`, `PolicyDenied`, `PolicyEscalated`

```python
from action_policy import PolicyEngine
engine = PolicyEngine.from_template("safe_coding")
decision = engine.evaluate(tool="bash", args={"command": "rm -rf /"})
decision.denied  # True
```

- [Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-action-policy) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-action-policy/) | [Full API](/llms-full.txt)
